channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quels sont les raccourcis du clavier Windows 11 à connaître ?
item.description: Avec la fin de Windows 10, le passage à la nouvelle version de l'OS inclut des changements. Pour vous faire gagner du temps, nous avons réuni ici les raccourcis clavier de Windows 11. Les incontournables comme les plus méconnus.

item.title: Microsoft forced to up AI spending by $25 billion to cover hardware price rises — says it 'remains confident in the return on these investments'
item.description: Microsoft expects a $190 billion capex in fiscal 2026, but around $25 billion of that is believed to come from rising costs.

item.title: Samsung officialise son Galaxy Book 6 Edge : les nouveautés de cet ultraportable XXL
item.description: Après avoir fuité dans les grandes largeurs en début de semaine, le Galaxy Book 6 Edge, troisième itération de l'ultraportable fin et léger de Samsung, se dévoile... cette fois de manière officielle.

item.title: Meta says its business AI now facilitates 10 million conversations a week
item.description: Meta said over 8 billion advertisers have used at least one of its gen AI tools

item.title: Japanese developer says they don't make games for Xbox because the console is 'not even stocked in major retail stores'
item.description: An indie game developer has explained why many smaller companies don't create Xbox ports.

item.title: Hausse des prix de la RAM, délais rallongés et pénurie, tout comprendre de la crise de la RAM
item.description: Vous entendez partout sans peut-être réellement comprendre les enjeux. La mémoire RAM s'arrache à prix d'or en ce moment et certains acteurs délaissent même le marché grand public. Une situation qui concerne en premier lieu les PC, mais pourrait par capillarité atteindre tous les produits tech. On vous explique tout ce que vous devez savoir à propos de la crise de la RAM. ...

item.title: Chuwi surprises the market with Lunar Lake Intel Core i5 laptop — sub-1kg device boasts 'all-day battery life', 2.8K display, and 2-megapixel camera, but will its $800 price tag prove to be its Achilles' heel
item.description: Chuwi surprises with new CoreBook Air laptop powered by Intel Core Ultra 226V processor delivering up to 97 TOPS of AI performance.

item.title: Fans react as Take-Two CEO speaks on GTA 6 price — 'I am perfectly fine with a $100 or more game'
item.description: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick has hinted at the price of Grand Theft Auto 6 by suggesting fans will pay a "reasonable" amount for a quality game.

item.title: Cyberattaque contre France Titres : un ado de 15 ans a été arrêté par la police
item.description: Un mineur de 15 ans a été placé en garde à vue le 25 avril 2026. L'adolescent est soupçonné d'avoir orchestré le piratage de l'ANTS (Agence nationale des titres sécurisés). Mis en examen, il risque jusqu'à 7 ans de prison et 300 000 euros d'amende.

item.title: Best Gifts for Hikers, Backpackers, Outdoorsy People (2026)
item.description: Let them pick out their own hiking boots. Instead, try gifting a useful blade or a nature journal to delight your outdoorsy friend.

item.title: Instagram says it doesn’t want your tweet round ups
item.description: The internet is full of copycat, stolen, reposted, and low-effort content - and Meta, at least publicly, has said it is working to cut off some of the reach. Beginning in 2024, the company has made incremental announcements saying it would begin limiting "unoriginal" content from being recommended on Instagram. It meant that if you […]

item.title: Is this ‘de-extinction’ project actually onto something?
item.description: Dallas-based genetics and biotech startup Colossal has raised hundreds of millions of dollars from venture capitalists, the CIA, and Peter Thiel, among others. Its buzzy "de-extinction" projects aim to "bring back" lost animals like the woolly mammoth, the Tasmanian tiger, and the dire wolf - although it isn't creating copies of extinct creatures from ancient […]...

item.title: Instagram cracks down on content aggregators
item.description: The update targets content aggregators that don't post original content and instead simply re-upload others' posts.

item.title: Instagram's recommendation algorithm will penalize 'unoriginal' photo and carousel posts
item.description: Meme creators and others who don't make "material" edits could get their reach throttled by Meta.

item.title: One of the best YouTube Premium features is finally coming to non-paying users
item.description: Google is rolling out picture-in-picture viewing to all YouTube users globally, removing one of Premium Lite's perks.

item.title: Meta lost 20 million users last quarter
item.description: Meta is planning to pump billions more into AI investments this year, despite noting that millions of users have seemingly started to abandon its platforms. In an earning call on Wednesday, Meta reported that figures for "Family daily active people" - the term Meta has coined for all collective users of Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, or […]

item.title: 'A transparent, consistent price at the register': Maryland is the first US state to ban 'surveillance pricing' — and shocked shoppers are hoping others follow suit soon
item.description: Maryland grocery stores will no longer be able to adjust pricing dynamically based on user data and other factors.

item.title: Thought the MacBook Pro was expensive? Apple's rumored MacBook Ultra could 'cost significantly more'
item.description: MacBook Ultra is again rumored — just cover your wallet's ears, as it sounds frighteningly pricey.

item.title: Google TV reste leader en Europe, mais Vidaa et les nouveaux systèmes gagnent du terrain
item.description: Selon les derniers chiffres rapportés par Omdia, Google TV domine toujours le marché des téléviseurs connectés en Europe, mais sa progression marque le pas alors que de nouvelles plateformes comme Vidaa, Titan OS ou TiVo OS montent en puissance.

item.title: Goal Zero Yeti 1500 Power Station Review (2026): More Power, Better Chemistry
item.description: Goal Zero’s new Yeti 1500 power station charges faster and has more juice to keep you powered up, no matter where you are.

item.title: Honor 600 Pro : Apple devrait-il s’inquiéter de ce clone (très) amélioré ?
item.description: Le Honor 600 Pro, dernier modèle de la marque, est disponible. Ce smartphone de haut de gamme embarque un châssis en métal mat, un capteur principal de 200 Mpx et une batterie de 6 400 mAh.

item.title: Ce plafonnier connecté Philips Hue éclaire les French Days avec son prix en baisse de -31%
item.description: Le Philips Hue Devote est un plafonnier connecté, ici proposé en taille S avec un diamètre de 30 cm qui peut afficher une lumière blanche ou colorée, en promo à 59,99 euros ou 54,99 euros au lieu de 79,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: OpenAI’s new security model is for ‘critical cyber defenders’ only
item.description: OpenAI is preparing to launch a new frontier cybersecurity model, GPT-5.5-Cyber. CEO Sam Altman said the model will not be available to the general public, but will be first rolled out to a select group of trusted "cyber defenders" in order for institutions to shore up their cyberdefenses. The limited rollout will take place "in […]

item.title: ‘The cost of compute is far beyond the costs of the employees': Nvidia continues to stress importance of human workers - but how long can we all hang on?
item.description: Nvidia exec claims AI is still currently more expensive than paying humans.

item.title: Use Gmail’s ‘Manage Subscriptions’ Tool to Cut Down on Inbox Clutter
item.description: Find and remove newsletter subscriptions more easily using Gmail’s built-in tools for organizing bulk emails.

item.title: This Summer, the American Water Crisis Becomes Real
item.description: Concern over water access are poised to consume summer in the US, as crises in Corpus Christi and across the Colorado River threaten to boil over.

item.title: The more young people use AI, the more they hate it
item.description: It's been almost three years since Silicon Valley started aggressively pushing large language model-based chatbots like ChatGPT as the supposedly inevitable future of everything, and there's no group that has felt the pressure quite like Gen Z. Like with many tech trends before it, it's no surprise that young people are among the biggest adopters […]...

item.title: DJI’s Osmo Pocket 4 is a better camera in every respect
item.description: First they came for the drones, and now the vlogging cameras. DJI's Osmo Pocket 4 is the first of its compact steadicams not to launch in the US, following a string of DJI drones also missing the US market. The good news for American buyers is that the Pocket 4 is mostly an evolutionary upgrade, […]

item.title: Lanterns release date on HBO Max has reportedly been revealed — and the comic book show could air as soon as House of the Dragon season 3 has ended
item.description: The DCU's next TV show has seemingly landed a mid-August release date on HBO and HBO Max.

item.title: Netomi raises $110 million as Accenture and Adobe bet on AI for customer service
item.description: Netomi, the San Francisco-based startup building AI systems for enterprise customer service, said Thursday that it has raised $110 million in new funding in a round led by Accenture Ventures, with participation from Adobe Ventures, WndrCo, Silver Lake Waterman, NAVER Ventures, Metis Strategy and Fin Capital. Jeffrey Katzenberg, managing partner of WndrCo and co-founder of DreamWorks, has joined the company's board. The round builds on early backing from a roster of AI luminaries that includes OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman, Google DeepMind co-founder Demis Hassabis and Microsoft AI CEO Mustaf...

item.title: Why one outage can still take down half the internet
item.description: When Cloudflare goes down, a significant amount of the internet falls with it. Services stalled, platforms froze, find out why a single outage causes so much difficulty.

item.title: Pourquoi le succès de MagSafe ne lui assurerait pas forcément un avenir sur l’iPhone
item.description: En dépit de son écrasant succès sur l'iPhone, le système de fixation magnétique MagSafe pourrait ne pas perdurer indéfiniment sur les smartphones d'Apple. On vous explique pourquoi.

item.title: Google, Samsung, Xiaomi… les 9 meilleurs deals pour changer son smartphone durant les French Days
item.description: Les French Days viennent de démarrer et pour celles et ceux qui souhaiteraient changer de smartphone, vous allez être servis : Google Pixel 10a, Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra, Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 5G… les plus grandes marques sont au rendez-vous avec des remises attractives. C’est clairement le moment d’en profiter !

item.title: French Days : voici les meilleures offres Tech en DIRECT de ce jeudi 30 avril 2026
item.description: Les French Days continuent sur Boulanger, Fnac, Darty, Cdiscount et bien d'autres, ainsi que la French Week sur Amazon ! Comptez sur nous pour encore vous partager dans cet article, qui sera régulièrement mis à jour, les meilleures offres qui tombent sur les produits Tech populaires en 2026.

item.title: EufyMake E1 UV Printer Review (2026): Add 3D Texture to Mugs, Magnets, and More
item.description: The UV printer lets you customize on almost anything, but it basically needs its own bedroom and probably can’t make rent.

item.title: Adieu le Vision Pro : Apple miserait tout sur un autre produit, moins ambitieux
item.description: Le casque le plus ambitieux d'Apple n'aura pas de successeur. L'avenir du spatial computing tiendrait dans une paire de lunettes sans écran.

item.title: These Men Allegedly Profit Off Teaching People How to Make AI Porn
item.description: Three Arizona women have filed a lawsuit against a group of men that alleges they used the women’s photos to make AI porn influencers, then offered online courses showing others how to do it.

item.title: People are saying Lady Gaga’s ‘Runway’ video looks like a Target ad. Here’s what they mean
item.description: Target’s commercials have become a visual reference to an earlier era of advertising that was more colorful and camp. In the music video for “Runway,” Lady Gaga’s collaboration with Doechii for The Devil Wears Prada 2 soundtrack, the wardrobes are high fashion and the musicians and their dancers serve, pose, and vogue. Colorful and camp, it’s everything you’d expect considering the subject matter of the song is about turning dance floors into runways....

item.title: Ce projet de montre connectée vise une autonomie infinie
item.description: Équipée d’un écran E-ink ainsi que d’une cellule solaire, la montre connectée LightInk se vante d’une autonomie de 40 jours à partir d’une seule recharge. Loin des fonctionnalités avancées d’une Pixel Watch, ce projet open source cherche avant tout à revenir à l’essentiel.

item.title: Sony clarifies ongoing PlayStation DRM issue, confirms digital games require a 'one-time online check' to authenticate licenses, but players won't experience any issues beyond that
item.description: Sony has finally responded to the ongoing PlayStation licensing issue, confirming that a constant internet connection won't be required to play digital games.

item.title: 80 % d’autonomie en 3h au soleil : l’incroyable innovation du vélo électrique Phosgo
item.description: Le vélo solaire électrique Phosgo veut rayonner sur le marché du VAE avec 4 panneaux sur les roues, un moteur central puissant et de la sécurité intégrée pour laisser charger au soleil.

item.title: Gemini can now generate files in Google Docs, PDF, Word with just a prompt
item.description: Google has updated Gemini to be able to create fully prepared, downloadable files directly within the chatbot interface.

item.title: I tested LG's new all-in-one Dolby Atmos soundbar, and it impressed me with its expansive sound and FlexConnect upgrade potential — but I wish it had these two features
item.description: LG’s Dolby Atmos FlexConnect soundbar hits a lot of the right notes, but can it outclass the likes of Sonos and Samsung?

item.title: Les constructeurs historiques se réveillent enfin face à Tesla et la Chine : voici l’OS des nouvelles voitures électriques Hyundai et Kia
item.description: Le groupe Hyundai (incluant Kia et Genesis) vient de dévoiler son nouveau système d'infodivertissement, baptisé Pleos Connect. Basé sur Android Automotive, il arrivera en Europe sur la Ioniq 3 à l'automne 2026 avec des promesses de connectivité et d'ergonomie au meilleur niveau.

item.title: How to reliably connect LLMs to real-world data and systems
item.description: MCP Is great, but it isn’t the whole AI answer
